prompt: An Art Nouveau style illustration of an excessively tailored suit jacket displayed on a mannequin, with flowing, organic, decorative lines forming intricate seams and curves across the fabric. The suit appears overly detailed and unnaturally shaped, emphasizing excessive customization. Surrounding elements include elegant botanical motifs and stylized floral patterns integrated into the composition. Flat colors, muted earthy tones, decorative borders, and flowing linework typical of late 19th-century Art Nouveau posters. No text, no modern elements.
tradition_approach: Used flowing organic lines, decorative floral motifs, flat muted colors, and stylized composition to mirror Art Nouveau’s emphasis on natural forms and ornamental structure.
